announcement.text: Meet the AI receptionist that answers calls, books jobs, and helps customers 24/7 for AMD Plumbing & Gas.

sections.headline: AI-powered call handling for every plumbing emergency
sections.description: Never miss a customer call again. An AI receptionist that books jobs, answers FAQs, and routes emergencies — around the clock.

items.title: Smart call routing
items.description: Instantly triages emergency vs. routine calls and routes to the right team member or books directly.

items.title: Natural conversations
items.description: Customers speak naturally about their plumbing issue and the AI understands context, urgency, and location.

items.title: Always available
items.description: 24/7 coverage means no missed calls during after-hours emergencies, weekends, or holidays.

items.title: Instant booking
items.description: Automatically schedules appointments and sends confirmations without any manual follow-up.

sections.headline: How AMD Plumbing & Gas benefits from AI reception
sections.description: From burst pipes at midnight to routine maintenance bookings, the AI receptionist handles it all professionally.

items.title: Emergency call triage
items.description: AI identifies urgent plumbing emergencies like burst pipes and gas leaks, immediately escalating to on-call plumbers.

items.title: Automated job booking
items.description: Customers book hot water repairs, drain cleaning, and inspections through natural conversation — no hold times.

items.title: FAQ and quote requests
items.description: Handles common questions about pricing, service areas, and licensing while capturing leads for custom quotes.

sections.headline: What Brisbane homeowners say
sections.description: 330+ five-star Google reviews from satisfied customers across Brisbane.

items.text: Called at 10pm with a burst pipe and AMD had someone out within the hour. Professional, friendly, and fixed it fast.
items.name: Sarah M.

items.text: Upfront pricing with no surprises. Andre and the team replaced our hot water system same day. Highly recommend.
items.name: James R.

items.text: Best plumber we have ever used. They did a full CCTV drain inspection and explained everything clearly. Fair pricing too.
items.name: Michelle T.

items.text: Blocked drain on a Sunday morning — they answered straight away and had it sorted before lunch. Lifesavers.
items.name: David K.

items.text: Used AMD for a pre-purchase plumbing inspection. Thorough report that saved us from buying a money pit. Thank you!
items.name: Lisa W.

items.text: Gas fitting work done to the highest standard. Licensed, insured, and genuinely care about doing the job right.
items.name: Mark P.
